Southern Annular Mode (SAM) from the 20CRV3
Using the definition for the SAM from web-page
https://www.antarcticglaciers.org/glaciers-and-climate/southern-annular-mode/
Zonal mean SLP 40S (standardized by month) minus 65S- (standardized by month)
Using 1981-2010 for standardization period
